title: Baton Architecture Rules
description: Project-level architectural rules checked by release-audit-design.sh. Defines canonical docs and rule set.

canonical_docs.description: Canonical architectural source-of-truth documents. The planner consults these; the audit checks conformance.

data_model.description: Path to canonical data model / schema (ERD, DBML, type definitions)

api_contracts.description: Paths to API contract documents (OpenAPI, protobuf, shared types)

component_hierarchy.description: Paths to component library / hierarchy docs

architectural_decisions.description: Path to ADR directory or index

design_tokens.description: Path to design token source file (tokens.json, etc.)

description.description: Human-readable description of what the rule enforces

check.description: Check type: grep (regex match), touchpoints (planned-file audit), diff-size (growth limits), external (SAST/lint tool)

files.description: Glob pattern(s) for files to scan (comma-separated)

command.description: Shell command for external checks. {files} placeholder substitutes matched files.

max_lines_added.description: For diff-size checks: maximum lines a file may grow in one slice

max_file_lines.description: For diff-size checks: maximum absolute file size in lines

touchpoint_source.description: For touchpoints checks: where to read planned files from
